title: IP Ranges to White-List

posts.author: Helen (Helen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone!

We’ve gotten a few questions about this, so I wanted to make a post about our IP ranges for devs who need to white-label any monday traffic.

The IP addresses that POST addresses are sent from are 82.115.214.0/24, or 82.115.214.0 to 82.115.214.255.

Here is our comprehensive article about this in our support portal:
https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/360012300479-What-are-monday-com-public-IP-ranges-.

Hope this helps, and let us know if you have any questions!
